answer:
Let $N = 13^{2023}$. We want to find the tens digit of $N$. This is equivalent to finding $N \pmod{100}$.
We have $\phi(100) = \phi(2^2 \cdot 5^2) = \phi(2^2) \phi(5^2) = (2^2 - 2^1)(5^2 - 5^1) = (4-2)(25-5) = 2 \cdot 20 = 40$.
By Euler's totient theorem, $13^{40} \equiv 1 \pmod{100}$.
We have $2023 = 40 \cdot 50 + 23$.
Therefore, $13^{2023} = 13^{40 \cdot 50 + 23} = (13^{40})^{50} \cdot 13^{23} \equiv 1^{50} \cdot 13^{23} \equiv 13^{23} \pmod{100}$.

Now we want to compute $13^{23} \pmod{100}$.
We have $13^1 \equiv 13 \pmod{100}$.
$13^2 \equiv 169 \equiv 69 \pmod{100}$.
$13^3 \equiv 13 \cdot 69 \equiv 13 \cdot (70-1) \equiv 910 - 13 \equiv 897 \equiv 97 \pmod{100}$.
$13^4 \equiv 13 \cdot 97 \equiv 13 \cdot (100-3) \equiv 1300 - 39 \equiv 1261 \equiv 61 \pmod{100}$.
$13^5 \equiv 13 \cdot 61 \equiv 13 \cdot (60+1) \equiv 780 + 13 \equiv 793 \equiv 93 \pmod{100}$.
$13^6 \equiv 13 \cdot 93 \equiv 13 \cdot (90+3) \equiv 1170 + 39 \equiv 1209 \equiv 9 \pmod{100}$.
$13^7 \equiv 13 \cdot 9 \equiv 117 \equiv 17 \pmod{100}$.
$13^8 \equiv 13 \cdot 17 \equiv 221 \equiv 21 \pmod{100}$.
$13^9 \equiv 13 \cdot 21 \equiv 273 \equiv 73 \pmod{100}$.
$13^{10} \equiv 13 \cdot 73 \equiv 13 \cdot (70+3) \equiv 910 + 39 \equiv 949 \equiv 49 \pmod{100}$.
$13^{11} \equiv 13 \cdot 49 \equiv 13 \cdot (50-1) \equiv 650 - 13 \equiv 637 \equiv 37 \pmod{100}$.
$13^{12} \equiv 13 \cdot 37 \equiv 13 \cdot (30+7) \equiv 390 + 91 \equiv 481 \equiv 81 \pmod{100}$.
$13^{13} \equiv 13 \cdot 81 \equiv 13 \cdot (80+1) \equiv 1040 + 13 \equiv 1053 \equiv 53 \pmod{100}$.
$13^{14} \equiv 13 \cdot 53 \equiv 13 \cdot (50+3) \equiv 650 + 39 \equiv 689 \equiv 89 \pmod{100}$.
$13^{15} \equiv 13 \cdot 89 \equiv 13 \cdot (90-1) \equiv 1170 - 13 \equiv 1157 \equiv 57 \pmod{100}$.
$13^{16} \equiv 13 \cdot 57 \equiv 13 \cdot (50+7) \equiv 650 + 91 \equiv 741 \equiv 41 \pmod{100}$.
$13^{17} \equiv 13 \cdot 41 \equiv 13 \cdot (40+1) \equiv 520 + 13 \equiv 533 \equiv 33 \pmod{100}$.
$13^{18} \equiv 13 \cdot 33 \equiv 13 \cdot (30+3) \equiv 390 + 39 \equiv 429 \equiv 29 \pmod{100}$.
$13^{19} \equiv 13 \cdot 29 \equiv 13 \cdot (30-1) \equiv 390 - 13 \equiv 377 \equiv 77 \pmod{100}$.
$13^{20} \equiv 13 \cdot 77 \equiv 13 \cdot (70+7) \equiv 910 + 91 \equiv 1001 \equiv 1 \pmod{100}$.
Therefore, $13^{23} = 13^{20} \cdot 13^3 \equiv 1 \cdot 97 \equiv 97 \pmod{100}$.

The tens digit of $13^{2023}$ is 9.

Final Answer: $\boxed{9}$
